parents.subject: LU-19469 llite: add hole page stats for read and readahead

commit.subject: LU-19469 osc: prune hole caching for lock BAST with read mode
commit.message:
LU-19469 osc: prune hole caching for lock BAST with read mode

It must aslo prune hole extent caching for lock blocking AST
with PR mode.

This patch also adds hole page stats for asynchronous readahead.

Add two tunable for OFD device:
obdfilter.*.hole_extent_kb: minimum hole extent size in KB
obdfilter.*.holemap_size: maximum number of invalid hole
			  detections

Add sanity/test_856{n, o}.

Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I8de291d6a39b85824892a1538f2ef64319afd96d
